name: Artificers’ Guild
summary: Restricted institution for magical-industrial prototyping and relic integration.
day_to_day: Tests devices, repairs controlled magical systems, and refines practical enchantments for Alliance use.
who_works_there: Artificers, relic analysts, forge technicians, supervised enchanters, archive scribes.
who_uses_it: Regional planners, engineers, military overseers, and specialized workers needing approved magical tools.
authority: Can approve, deny, or quarantine certain classes of magical-industrial work.
public_manifestation: Visible through prototype demos, upgraded tools, secure workshops, and rumor about restricted rooms.
conflict_or_bottleneck: High-value knowledge concentration attracts spies and fuels fear of dangerous experimentation.
